description: Specifications Material: Foam Size: 20cm Color: Gold/Red Quantity: 20 christmas tree berries The Berry Fiasco: How Nigel Saved Christmas When Nigel from Bristol unpacked his christmas tree decorations, disaster struck. His vintage glass berries looked sadder than a rained-out cricket match. "Blimey!" he cried, spotting crushed berries underfoot. Then arrived our 20 pack berry stems - 20cm christmas berries so plump foam berries, they bounced back like cheeky schoolboys. Nigel gaped at the artificial red berries stems in burgundy berry picks and gold glitter berries. "Cor, they're tougher than the Queen's corgis!" he chuckled, testing their durable berry branches by accidentally sitting on a stem (which sprang back unscathed). Soon, Nigel's home became the talk of Gloucestershire. His xmas wreath berries? So lush, squirrels tried to move in. His wedding berry decorations for the village winter nuptials? Saved by these realistic berry stems that outshone the bride's bouquet. Even the vicar asked: "Are these natural-looking berries blessed by angels?" Nigel just winked, arranging sparkling berry picks into berry crafts supplies for the church bazaar. The secret? Non-toxic christmas decor that survived mince pie collisions and tipsy carolers! Now, Nigel hosts "Berry Brilliance" workshops, teaching neighbors to create christmas party berries displays. His motto: "With foam holly berries this long-lasting berry picks, even Boxing Day looks fabulous!" So whether you're decking halls or dodging in-laws, remember: All you need is 20 pack berry stems and a dash of British pluck!
